title: SeriesMetrics
description: SeriesMetrics contains metrics describing a DICOM series.

blobStorageSizeBytes.description: Total blob storage bytes for all instances in the series.

instanceCount.description: Number of instances in the series.

series.description: The series resource path. For example, `projects/{project_id}/locations/{location_id}/datasets/{dataset_id}/dicomStores/{dicom_store_id}/dicomWeb/studies/{study_uid}/series/{series_uid}`.

structuredStorageSizeBytes.description: Total structured storage bytes for all instances in the series.
